verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit David : Putasne est aliquis qui remanserit de domo Saul, ut faciam cum eo misericordiam propter Jonathan ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר דָּוִ֔ד הֲכִ֣י יֶשׁ־ע֔וֹד אֲשֶׁ֥ר נוֹתַ֖ר לְבֵ֣ית שָׁא֑וּל וְאֶעֱשֶׂ֤ה עִמּוֹ֙ חֶ֔סֶד בַּעֲב֖וּר יְהוֹנָתָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David said: Is there any one, think you, left of the house of Saul, that I may shew kindness to him for Jonathan's sake?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David sanoi: olleeko joku vielä jäänyt Saulin huoneesta, tehdäkseni laupiuden Jonatanin tähden hänelle.
verses.king_james: And David said, Is there yet any that is left of the house of Saul, that I may shew him kindness for Jonathan’s sake?

verses.latin_vulgate: Erat autem de domo Saul servus nomine Siba : quem cum vocasset rex ad se, dixit ei : Tune es Siba ? Et ille respondit : Ego sum servus tuus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְבֵ֨ית שָׁא֥וּל עֶ֙בֶד֙ וּשְׁמ֣וֹ צִיבָ֔א וַיִּקְרְאוּ־ל֖וֹ אֶל־דָּוִ֑ד וַיֹּ֨אמֶר הַמֶּ֧לֶךְ אֵלָ֛יו הַאַתָּ֥ה צִיבָ֖א וַיֹּ֥אמֶר עַבְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now there was of the house of Saul, a servant named Siba: and when the king had called him to him, he said to him: Art thou Siba? And he answered: I am Siba thy servant.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin oli palvelia Saulin huoneesta Ziba nimeltä, sen kutsuivat Davidin tykö. Ja kuningas sanoi hänelle: oletkos Ziba? Hän sanoi: olen, sinun palvelias.
verses.king_james: And there was of the house of Saul a servant whose name was Ziba. And when they had called him unto David, the king said unto him, Art thou Ziba? And he said, Thy servant is he.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait rex : Numquid superest aliquis de domo Saul, ut faciam cum eo misericordiam Dei ? Dixitque Siba regi : Superest filius Jonathæ, debilis pedibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ הַאֶ֨פֶס ע֥וֹד אִישׁ֙ לְבֵ֣ית שָׁא֔וּל וְאֶעֱשֶׂ֥ה עִמּ֖וֹ חֶ֣סֶד אֱלֹהִ֑ים וַיֹּ֤אמֶר צִיבָא֙ אֶל־הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ ע֛וֹד בֵּ֥ן לִיהוֹנָתָ֖ן נְכֵ֥ה רַגְלָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king said: Is there any one left of the house of Saul, that I may shew the mercy of God unto Him? And Siba said to the king: There is a son of Jonathan left, who is lame of his feet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuningas sanoi: onko vielä joku mies Saulin huoneesta, että minä Jumalan laupiuden tekisin hänelle? Ziba sanoi kuninkaalle: vielä on siellä Jonatanin poika, rampa jaloista.
verses.king_james: And the king said, Is there not yet any of the house of Saul, that I may shew the kindness of God unto him? And Ziba said unto the king, Jonathan hath yet a son, which is lame on his feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ubi, inquit, est ? Et Siba ad regem : Ecce, ait, in domo est Machir filii Ammiel, in Lodabar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּֽאמֶר־ל֥וֹ הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ אֵיפֹ֣ה ה֑וּא וַיֹּ֤אמֶר צִיבָא֙ אֶל־הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ הִנֵּה־ה֗וּא בֵּ֛ית מָכִ֥יר בֶּן־עַמִּיאֵ֖ל בְּל֥וֹ דְבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Where is he? said he. And Siba said to the king: Behold he is in the house of Machir the son of Ammiel in Lodabar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuningas sanoi hänelle: kussa hän on? Ziba sanoi kuninkaalle: katso, hän on Lodabarissa, Makirin, Ammielin pojan huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And the king said unto him, Where is he? And Ziba said unto the king, Behold, he is in the house of Machir, the son of Ammiel, in Lo–debar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit ergo rex David, et tulit eum de domo Machir filii Ammiel, de Lodabar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֖ח הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ דָּוִ֑ד וַיִּקָּחֵ֗הוּ מִבֵּ֛ית מָכִ֥יר בֶּן־עַמִּיאֵ֖ל מִלּ֥וֹ דְבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then King David sent, and brought him out of the house of Machir the son of Ammiel of Lodabar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuningas David lähetti ja antoi tuoda hänen Lodabarista, Makirin Ammielin pojan huoneesta.
verses.king_james: Then king David sent, and fetched him out of the house of Machir, the son of Ammiel, from Lo–debar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum autem venisset Miphiboseth filius Jonathæ filii Saul ad David, corruit in faciem suam, et adoravit. Dixitque David : Miphiboseth ? Qui respondit : Adsum servus tuus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יָּבֹ֠א מְפִיבֹ֨שֶׁת בֶּן־יְהוֹנָתָ֤ן בֶּן־שָׁאוּל֙ אֶל־דָּוִ֔ד וַיִּפֹּ֥ל עַל־פָּנָ֖יו וַיִּשְׁתָּ֑חוּ וַיֹּ֤אמֶר דָּוִד֙ מְפִיבֹ֔שֶׁת וַיֹּ֖אמֶר הִנֵּ֥ה עַבְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Miphiboseth the son of Jonathan the son of Saul was come to David, he fell on his face and worshipped. And David said: Miphiboseth? And he answered: Behold thy servant.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin MephiBoset, Saulin pojan Jonatanin poika tuli Davidin tykö, lankesi hän kasvoillensa ja kumarsi. Ja David sanoi: MephiBoset! Hän vastasi: tässä olen, sinun palvelias.
verses.king_james: Now when Mephibosheth, the son of Jonathan, the son of Saul, was come unto David, he fell on his face, and did reverence. And David said, Mephibosheth. And he answered, Behold thy servant!

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait ei David : Ne timeas, quia faciens faciam in te misericordiam propter Jonathan patrem tuum, et restituam tibi omnes agros Saul patris tui : et tu comedes panem in mensa mea semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֩אמֶר֩ ל֨וֹ דָוִ֜ד אַל־תִּירָ֗א כִּ֣י עָשֹׂה֩ אֶעֱשֶׂ֨ה עִמְּךָ֥ חֶ֙סֶד֙ בַּֽעֲבוּר֙ יְהוֹנָתָ֣ן אָבִ֔יךָ וַהֲשִׁבֹתִ֣י לְךָ֔ אֶֽת־כׇּל־שְׂדֵ֖ה שָׁא֣וּל אָבִ֑יךָ וְאַתָּ֗ה תֹּ֥אכַל לֶ֛חֶם עַל־שֻׁלְחָנִ֖י תָּמִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David said to him: Fear not, for I will surely shew thee mercy for Jonathan thy father's sake, and I will restore the lands of Saul the father, and thou shalt eat bread at my table always.
verses.finnish_biblia: David sanoi hänelle: älä pelkää; sillä minä totisesti teen laupiuden sinun kanssas Jonatanin sinun isäs tähden, ja minä annan sinulle kaikki sinun isäs Saulin pellot jälleen, ja sinä syöt jokapäivä leipää minun pöydältäni.
verses.king_james: And David said unto him, Fear not: for I will surely shew thee kindness for Jonathan thy father’s sake, and will restore thee all the land of Saul thy father; and thou shalt eat bread at my table continually.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui adorans eum, dixit : Quis ego sum servus tuus, quoniam respexisti super canem mortuum similem mei ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁתַּ֕חוּ וַיֹּ֖אמֶר מֶ֣ה עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֣י פָנִ֔יתָ אֶל־הַכֶּ֥לֶב הַמֵּ֖ת אֲשֶׁ֥ר כָּמֽוֹנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: He bowed down to him, and said: Who am I thy servant, that thou shouldst look upon such a dead dog as I am?
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän kumarsi ja sanoi: kuka olen minä sinun palvelias, ettäs käänsit sinus kuolleen koiran puoleen, niinkuin minä olen?
verses.king_james: And he bowed himself, and said, What is thy servant, that thou shouldest look upon such a dead dog as I am?

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavit itaque rex Sibam puerum Saul, et dixit ei : Omnia quæcumque fuerunt Saul, et universam domum ejus, dedi filio domini tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֣א הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ אֶל־צִיבָ֛א נַ֥עַר שָׁא֖וּל וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֑יו כֹּל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר הָיָ֤ה לְשָׁאוּל֙ וּלְכׇל־בֵּית֔וֹ נָתַ֖תִּי לְבֶן־אֲדֹנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the King called Siba the servant of Saul, and said to him: All that belonged to Saul, and all his house, I have given to thy master's son.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kutsui kuningas Ziban, Saulin palvelian, ja sanoi hänelle: minä olen antanut sinun herras pojalle kaiken sen mikä Saulin oma on ollut ja koko hänen huoneensa oma.
verses.king_james: Then the king called to Ziba, Saul’s servant, and said unto him, I have given unto thy master’s son all that pertained to Saul and to all his house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Operare igitur ei terram tu, et filii tui, et servi tui, et inferes filio domini tui cibos ut alatur : Miphiboseth autem filius domini tui comedet semper panem super mensam meam. Erant autem Sibæ quindecim filii, et viginti servi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָבַ֣דְתָּ לּ֣וֹ אֶֽת־הָאֲדָמָ֡ה אַתָּה֩ וּבָנֶ֨יךָ וַעֲבָדֶ֜יךָ וְהֵבֵ֗אתָ וְהָיָ֨ה לְבֶן־אֲדֹנֶ֤יךָ לֶּ֙חֶם֙ וַאֲכָל֔וֹ וּמְפִיבֹ֙שֶׁת֙ בֶּן־אֲדֹנֶ֔יךָ יֹאכַ֥ל תָּמִ֛יד לֶ֖חֶם עַל־שֻׁלְחָנִ֑י וּלְצִיבָ֗א חֲמִשָּׁ֥ה עָשָׂ֛ר בָּנִ֖ים וְעֶשְׂרִ֥ים עֲבָדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou therefore and the sons and thy servants shall till the land for him: and thou shalt bring in food for thy master's son, that he may be maintained: and Miphiboseth the son of thy master shall always eat bread at my table. And Siba had fifteen sons and twenty servants.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pitää sinun, ja sinun lapses, ja palvelias viljelemän hänen peltojansa ja korjaaman herras pojalle leiväksi ja ravinnoksi. Mutta MephiBoset sinun herras poika syö jokapäivä leipää minun pöydältäni. Ja Ziballa oli viisitoistakymmentä poikaa ja kaksikymmentä palveliaa.
verses.king_james: Thou therefore, and thy sons, and thy servants, shall till the land for him, and thou shalt bring in the fruits, that thy master’s son may have food to eat: but Mephibosheth thy master’s son shall eat bread alway at my table. Now Ziba had fifteen sons and twenty servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Siba ad regem : Sicut jussisti, domine mi rex, servo tuo, sic faciet servus tuus : et Miphiboseth comedet super mensam meam, quasi unus de filiis regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר צִיבָא֙ אֶל־הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ כְּכֹל֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר יְצַוֶּ֜ה אֲדֹנִ֤י הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ אֶת־עַבְדּ֔וֹ כֵּ֖ן יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ וּמְפִיבֹ֗שֶׁת אֹכֵל֙ עַל־שֻׁלְחָנִ֔י כְּאַחַ֖ד מִבְּנֵ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Siba said to the king: As thou my lord the hast commanded thy servant, so will thy servant do: and Miphiboseth shall eat at my table, as one of the sons of the King.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ziba sanoi kuninkaalle: kaikki mitä minun herrani kuningas on palveliallensa käskenyt, tekee palvelias; ja MephiBoset syököön minun pöydältäni, niinkuin yksi kuninkaan lapsista.
verses.king_james: Then said Ziba unto the king, According to all that my lord the king hath commanded his servant, so shall thy servant do. As for Mephibosheth, said the king, he shall eat at my table, as one of the king’s sons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habebat autem Miphiboseth filium parvulum nomine Micha : omnis vero cognatio domus Sibæ serviebat Miphiboseth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִמְפִיבֹ֥שֶׁת בֵּן־קָטָ֖ן וּשְׁמ֣וֹ מִיכָ֑א וְכֹל֙ מוֹשַׁ֣ב בֵּית־צִיבָ֔א עֲבָדִ֖ים לִמְפִיבֹֽשֶׁת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Miphiboseth had a young son whose name was Micha: and all that kindred of the house of Siba served Miphiboseth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja MephiBosetilla oli yksi vähä poika nimeltä Miika; mutta kaikki, jotka Ziban huoneesta olivat, olivat MephiBosetin palveliat.
verses.king_james: And Mephibosheth had a young son, whose name was Micha. And all that dwelt in the house of Ziba were servants unto Mephibosheth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Miphiboseth habitabat in Jerusalem, quia de mensa regis jugiter vescebatur : et erat claudus utroque pede.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמְפִיבֹ֗שֶׁת יֹשֵׁב֙ בִּיר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם כִּ֣י עַל־שֻׁלְחַ֥ן הַמֶּ֛לֶךְ תָּמִ֖יד ה֣וּא אֹכֵ֑ל וְה֥וּא פִסֵּ֖חַ שְׁתֵּ֥י רַגְלָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But Miphiboseth dwelt in Jerusalem: because he ate always of the king's table: and he was lame of both feet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja MephiBoset asui Jerusalemissa; sillä hän söi jokapäivä kuninkaan pöydältä; ja hän ontui molemmista jaloistansa.
verses.king_james: So Mephibosheth dwelt in Jerusalem: for he did eat continually at the king’s table; and was lame on both his feet.
